title: Digital banks — check requirements
intro: App-led onboarding can be fast for simple cases — you still pass identity and compliance checks. Nothing here guarantees approval.

items.reason: Onboarding: Dutch-licensed app bank with English flows and paid plans. Best for: people who want a full local-style account with strong app controls when eligibility fits. Watch-outs: compare monthly plan cost vs free tiers elsewhere; confirm salary and direct-debit needs on bunq’s site.

Onboarding: international app with multi-currency features — NL product scope can differ from a classic Dutch betaalrekening. Best for: spending, travel, and bridging money while you also evaluate a local account if needed. Watch-outs: validate iDEAL and local Dutch debit expectations for your case.

Onboarding: mobile euro account — availability and features vary by market; read N26’s Netherlands pages carefully. Best for: simple euro day-to-day use where the product matches your needs. Watch-outs: confirm deposit protection scope, fees, and whether your employer accepts the IBAN format they issue.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
